title: BND Mine Backpacks
description: DLC mod created for BND Mine Modpack but you can use him on your Modpack.
body:
DLC for Modpack: BND Mine Origins

This mod adds the ability to create and use backpacks. They are created in this fashion much easier and cheaper than in analogues. And the most important thing is that this mod does not affect your FPS in the game at all.
